Document:
# General Command SOP
[bold]1.[/bold] Command members are to ensure the safety of the entire station, each primarily responsible for their own Department and respective duties;
[bold]2.[/bold] Command members are to ensure the wellbeing and dignity of [color=#134975]Nanotrasen[/color] and its related assets;
[bold]3.[/bold] Command members may not slander or libel [color=#134975]Nanotrasen[/color];
## General Command OOC Rules and Expectations
[bold]0.[/bold] Command is held to a higher standard when it comes to breaking SOP, though following SOP is still not necessarily a rule.
[bold]1.[/bold] Command should always act professionally, prioritizing the station running smoothly over antics. The station CAN run smoothly when antics are happening though.
[bold]2.[/bold] It is the duty of command to make sure that interns in their departments are taught. You should prioritize this over non station critical activities. Where possible, you should do the teaching personally.
[bold]3.[/bold] When promoting individuals, the consent of the individual is [bold]required[/bold]. Players who do not want to play a role should not be pressured into playing it. This is because players may have role bans, or other factors such as lack of experience that lead them to deny a promotion, and forcing them into a role they are not ready for, or are explicitly currently not allowed to play is not how things should be done. If a player denies a promotion, you are forbidden to pursue the matter further.
## Departmental SOP [italic](All Command SOP can also be found under the respective department's SOP)[/italic] - [textlink="Captain" link="CaptainSOP"] - [textlink="Head of Personnel" link="HoPSOP"] - [textlink="Head of Security" link="HoSSOP"] - [textlink="Research Director" link="RDSOP"] - [textlink="Chief Medical Officer" link="CMOSOP"] - [textlink="Chief Engineer" link="CESOP"] - [textlink="Quartermaster" link="QMSOP"]
Please also see: - [textlink="Order of Sucession" link="OrderOfSuccession"]
[color=#999999][italic]"The Captain, despite being in charge of the Station, is not separate from Nanotrasen. Any attempts to disregard general company policy are to be considered an instant condition for contract termination;"[/italic] - Captain SOP {7}[/color]
